title: pyrus umbellifera
intro: Pyrus umbellifera, also known as the Himalayan apple, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayan region. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pyrus umbellifera include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pyrus umbellifera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, tonics, and other remedies for various health conditions.
